title: Thai-Style Spicy Brazilian Sushi Nigiri
description: A fusion of spicy Thai flavors with the heartiness of traditional Brazilian cuisine, presented in nigiri form using a fondue pot for raw-friendly preparation.
instructions: Prepare the fondue pot according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Heat the Sushi Rice to a safe internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, puree together the diced Thai Chilies, chopped Cilantro, grated Ginger, and 1 tablespoon of Vegetable Oil until well combined.
Transfer the Sushi Rice to the fondue pot and mix in the pureed Chilies, Cilantro, and Ginger mixture until the rice is well coated.
